roles.title: Founding Engineer for AI
roles.summary: Join as a founding engineer to shape our AI strategy from the ground up. You'll architect and ship production AI systems, define our technical direction, and build the foundation for how we deliver intelligent solutions to enterprise clients.
responsibilities: Architect and ship end-to-end AI solutions for enterprise use-cases
Build production-grade LLM pipelines, RAG systems, and agentic workflows
Define technical standards and best practices for AI engineering at Nanox
Work directly with leadership to translate business problems into AI-powered solutions
Own the full stack: from model selection and fine-tuning to deployment and monitoring
Establish evaluation frameworks and quality gates for AI features
Mentor and grow the AI team as we scale
requirements: 5+ years in software engineering with 2+ years shipping production AI/ML systems
Deep hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG, vector databases, and modern AI frameworks
Strong Python and experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Track record of taking AI projects from prototype to production at scale
Entrepreneurial mindset: comfort with ambiguity and bias toward shipping
Strong communication skills and ability to explain complex AI concepts to non-technical stakeholders
Experience in regulated industries (healthcare, finance, energy) is a plus
